visual_description: A young man with glasses and a brown jacket stands in a large, dimly lit stone hall, looking at a young woman with long red hair. He reaches out and gently cups her face with his hand. They lean in and kiss as other people run past them in the background.
audio_description: A male voice shouts urgently in the background, followed by a loud, dramatic musical score.
